scenarioName: Add input validation to API endpoints

turns.userMessage: Add comprehensive input validation to all API endpoints in app.js. For each endpoint: (1) validate required fields are present, (2) validate data types (id must be numeric, name must be string, email must match email format), (3) validate string lengths (name: 1-100 chars, email: max 254 chars), (4) return descriptive 400 errors listing which validations failed. Create a validation helper module in validation.js to keep the route handlers clean.
